name: bookmark-manager-extension
description: A powerful bookmark manager extension for Chrome and Edge browsers

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -r bookmark-manager.zip dist/
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && zip -r bookmark-manager-chrome.zip dist/
scripts.package:edge: npm run build:edge && zip -r bookmark-manager-edge.zip dist/
scripts.postinstall: echo 'Dependencies installed. Run npm run dev to start development.'
